metadata.title: Grins Professional Irrigation & Landscaping Services — Complete Service Price List
metadata.status: DRAFT — pending Viktor confirmation on flagged source typos before seeding

known_source_typos.issue: Source says 'linear food' — should be 'linear foot'. Structured value uses linear_foot.
Source says 'Per diameter Inter' — should be 'Per diameter Inch'. Structured unit uses diameter_inch.
Source has duplicated word: '$15 per plant plant'. Treated as $15 per plant.
Source reads '$0.75 per 100-150 sq at 2-3 inch depth' — unit is ambiguous. All other mulch rows use 'per sq ft', so structured value uses square_foot but flagged for Viktor confirmation.
Commercial price not listed in source document — only residential ($600) is specified.
Inconsistent coverage units between residential ('800 Sq Ft.') and commercial ("8'x12' ~900sq/f"). Numeric coverage preserved as written.
Source omits 'per zone' on commercial drip ($1,500 – $2,500) while residential uses 'per zone'. Structured as flat_range; may have been intended as per_zone_range.

pricing_model_glossary.flat_range: Min/max fixed price — quoted per job, not per unit.
pricing_model_glossary.per_unit_flat: Single price per measurable unit (per sq ft, per linear foot, per head, etc.).
pricing_model_glossary.per_unit_range: Min/max price per measurable unit; final price within range depends on factors named in profile_factor or depends_on.
pricing_model_glossary.per_unit_flat_plus_materials: Per-unit labor price plus material cost passed through at cost.
pricing_model_glossary.per_zone_range: Per-zone min/max price; profile_factor describes what drives high vs low end.
pricing_model_glossary.tiered_zone_step: Base amount covers first N zones; additional_per_zone applies for each zone above N (up to max_zones_specified).
pricing_model_glossary.tiered_linear: Base amount covers first N units; additional_per_unit applies for each unit beyond.
pricing_model_glossary.compound_per_unit: Base amount plus per-unit charge (e.g., stump grinding = base + per-inch).
pricing_model_glossary.compound_repair: Flat repair fee plus separately billed locating/diagnostic time.
pricing_model_glossary.size_tier: Discrete fixed prices keyed to size buckets (small/medium/large).
pricing_model_glossary.size_tier_plus_materials: Size-tiered labor price plus material pass-through at cost.
pricing_model_glossary.yard_tier: Discrete fixed prices keyed to yardage buckets.
pricing_model_glossary.variants: Multiple distinct sub-services with their own fixed prices, sold under one heading.
pricing_model_glossary.flat_plus_materials: Fixed labor price plus materials pass-through at cost.
pricing_model_glossary.conditional_fee: Fixed fee that may be waived or credited under specific conditions.

compatibility_notes_for_existing_service: Existing ServiceOffering.pricing_model enum (flat/zone_based/hourly/custom) cannot represent: per_unit_range, tiered_zone_step, tiered_linear, compound_per_unit, size_tier, yard_tier, variants, conditional_fee, flat_plus_materials. Migration will need to extend the enum or move to a richer pricing_rule JSONB column.
Existing ServiceOffering has base_price + price_per_zone but no min/max range fields, no tier definitions, and no materials pass-through flag.
Recommend adding fields: price_min, price_max, pricing_rule (JSONB), includes_materials (bool), materials_pass_through (text), customer_type (enum: residential/commercial).

items.name: Irrigation System Installation

profile_factor.low_end: Flat over dirt, 4 heads per zone
profile_factor.high_end: Hilly over roots/grass, 5 heads per zone

items.source_text: $800 - $1000 per zone (depends on property profile & complexity). Flat over dirt is closer to $800 range with 4 heads per zone, hilly over roots/grass with 5 heads per zone closer to $1000 range
